rawIntent: Create src/modules/employee/employee.model.ts with TypeScript interfaces for Employee and CreateEmployeeDto using all canonical attributes. Create src/modules/employee/employee.repository.ts implementing IEmployeeRepository interface. Include unit tests in tests/unit/modules/employee/employee.repository.test.ts using Vitest (not Jest) with proper mocking of the pg Pool. Ensure all database access follows repository pattern (GP-001) with no direct queries outside repository. Update ARCHITECTURE.md to include the Employee domain entity and its repository interface. This phase depends on existing shared types from src/shared/types/index.ts.

successCriteria.description: src/modules/employee/employee.model.ts exists with TypeScript interfaces Employee and CreateEmployeeDto containing all canonical attributes
tests/unit/modules/employee/employee.repository.test.ts exists with Vitest tests properly mocking pg Pool
ARCHITECTURE.md updated to include Employee domain entity and repository interface
All database access follows repository pattern with no direct queries outside repository

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern - All database access goes through repository interfaces
GP-002: Audit records - All state-changing operations write an audit record
GP-003: Input validation - Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
GP-004: No sensitive data in logs - Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
GP-005: RBAC enforcement - All API endpoints enforce role-based access control
GP-006: Error handling - No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Dependency direction: leave -> employee, no reverse dependencies permitted
Use existing shared types from src/shared/types/index.ts
Use Vitest for testing, not Jest
outOfScope: Any changes outside src/modules/employee/, tests/unit/modules/employee/, and ARCHITECTURE.md

ambiguities.description: What are 'all canonical attributes' for Employee and CreateEmployeeDto? The intent doesn't specify field names, types, or constraints
options: Use minimal fields like id, name, email, managerId
Include comprehensive fields like department, hireDate, status, etc.
Reference existing database schema if available

ambiguities.description: What methods should IEmployeeRepository interface contain? The intent doesn't specify required repository methods
What should be included in the ARCHITECTURE.md update? The intent doesn't specify format or detail level
options: Detailed documentation of entity, repository, and relationships
